title: Performance Review 绩效评估
scene: 经理和员工进行年度绩效评估

lines.en: It is time for your annual review. Please have a seat.
Thank you. I have been looking forward to this.
lines.zh: 谢谢。我一直期待着这次评估。

lines.en: Overall, you have had a strong year. Your sales numbers are up 15 percent.
lines.zh: 总体来说，你这一年表现很好。销售额增长了15%。

lines.en: I am glad to hear that. I worked really hard on those accounts.
lines.zh: 很高兴听到这个。我在那些客户上花了很多心思。

lines.en: However, I would like to see you improve your time management.
lines.zh: 不过，我希望你在时间管理方面有所提高。

lines.en: I understand. Sometimes I spend too long on details.
lines.zh: 我明白。有时候我在细节上花太多时间。

lines.en: Exactly. Let us set a goal to work on that next quarter.
lines.zh: 没错。我们定个目标，下个季度重点改进。

lines.en: That sounds like a good plan. I will work on it.
lines.zh: 这计划很好。我会努力的。

lines.en: Great. Keep up the good work.
